zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Acton於大約1273年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿克頓時，他的父親Alan de Acton of Hellesby24歲，母親Beatrix Hatton16歲。他於1295年之前與Matilda Maud d'Agilofinges在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾阿克頓享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Acton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, especially in Shropshire and adjacent counties, named Acton. Generally, these are from Old English āc ‘oak’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In Ireland the surname has been established in Connacht since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Acton was born about 1273, in Acton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alan de Acton of Hellesby, was 24 and his mother, Beatrix Hatton, was 16. He married Matilda Maud d'Agilofinges before 1295, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1343, in Acton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Acton est né environ 1273, à Acton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alan de Acton of Hellesby, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Hatton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Maud d'Agilofinges avant 1295, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1343, à Acton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Actonが約1273年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアクトンで生まれた時，父Alan de Acton of Hellesbyは24歳，母Beatrix Hattonは16歳であった。1295年以前にイギリスでMatilda Maud d'Agilofingesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアアクトンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Acton(이)가 대략 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Acton of Hellesby(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Hatton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1295년 이전 영국에서 Matilda Maud d'Agilofinges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 악턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Acton родился около 1273 г. в местности актон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alan de Acton of Hellesby было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Hatton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Maud d'Agilofinges перед 1295 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1343 г. в местности актон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
